title: LakeSail discussion: typed Spark-compatible execution without giving up local Rust
author: manual import
text: Several data engineers are watching LakeSail because Spark-compatible APIs, DataFusion, and Arrow make a typed local lakehouse runtime feel plausible.

title: Pydantic AI adoption note
author: manual import
text: Teams are using Pydantic schemas to keep agent outputs typed, auditable, and easier to move into production data workflows.
